name: Alien Paradise
short_description: Help an extraterrestrial being to enjoy their staying on Planet Earth in this rhythm game.
detailed_description:
About the Game

In Alien Paradise, an extraterrestrial being decides to visit our planet, staying more specifically in Brazil, to enjoy their vacation.
For this, the player has to learn animation patterns that are presented at the start of the level. Throughout the level, one must press the button associated with the action shown on-screen, getting the closest to the right timing, following the rhythm of the song.

Main Features

  • Challenge your rhythmic abilities in more than 30 levels, each one of them representing a touristic, cultural or ordinary activity the alien wanted to do.
  • Select the scoring difficulty that better suits your playing style. Normal Mode is ideal for those who aren’t familiar with rhythm games, while Hard Mode demands more precision and attention from the player. Improve your precision to better score and get up to three stars, representing your performance.
  • At the end of each day, face the travel journal: a special level that interpolates between some of the activities played until that point. Get ready to test your memory and, more than ever, your attention.

supported_languages:
English*, Portuguese - Brazil, French, Spanish - Latin America, Japanese
*languages with full audio support
